[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

# Structured Version

- **YNA**
- **CPANEL**

# Notes

- The large “YNA” appears as part of the branding/logo.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A 3D render with a dark, reflective surface in the foreground, showing subtle orange and red reflections. The background is dark with swirling, glowing orange and red lines creating a sense of depth and energy. Dominating the center of the image are large, metallic 3D letters. The top line reads "YNA" in a bright, glossy orange with a strong metallic sheen and a subtle glow. Below it, the word "CPANEL" is rendered in a lighter, glossy white with a similar metallic texture and soft lighting. To the left of "CPANEL," there is a minimalist icon of stacked servers with three small circular lights on each server, all in a muted orange. To the right of the server icon, smaller text reads "POWERED BY YNA DEVELOPER" in a clean, sans-serif font, also in muted orange. In the top left corner, above the "YNA" letters, is the text "YNA STORE" with three small red dots to its right. In the top right corner, the words "FAST • STABLE • SECURE" are displayed in a thin, white sans-serif font. The overall style is sleek, modern, and high-tech, with a dramatic and energetic mood conveyed by the lighting and color scheme.
